title: PRIVATE SOUS CHEF - CHINESE CUISINE
description:
About the Role
We are seeking a highly skilled and discreet Private Sous Chef to join a private household, supporting the Head Chef in crafting and executing exceptional Chinese meals for the family and their guests. The ideal candidate brings both traditional expertise and modern refinement in Chinese cooking, with a deep appreciation for seasonal ingredients, health-conscious dining, and cultural significance.
This role is ideal for someone who finds joy in elevating everyday dining experiences while maintaining the highest standards of quality, hygiene, and service.

Key Responsibilities

  • Assist the Head Chef in daily meal preparation, primarily focusing on Chinese cuisine (Cantonese, Teochew, Sichuan, etc.)
  • Execute lunch and dinner service, including plated and family-style meals
  • Prepare stocks, sauces, and condiments from scratch in traditional methods
  • Source high-quality, seasonal ingredients and liaise with specialty suppliers
  • Maintain impeccable cleanliness and organisation of the household kitchen
  • Plan and prepare dishes for family events, intimate gatherings, and festive occasions
  • Cater to dietary preferences and health-conscious meal plans, without compromising on flavour
  • Stand in for the Head Chef when required

Requirements

  • Minimum 5 years of culinary experience, with at least 2 years in a private or fine-dining setting
  • Strong proficiency in Chinese culinary techniques (e.g., wok cooking, double boiling, dim sum prep)
  • Experience with menu planning and customisation to suit family preferences
  • High standards of hygiene, kitchen organisation, and time management
  • Ability to maintain confidentiality and professionalism within a private household
  • Willingness to work flexible hours, including weekends and occasional travel

What Sets This Role Apart

  • A unique opportunity to work in a high-end, private kitchen environment with a focus on Chinese cuisine excellence
  • Creative freedom to co-develop menus and elevate family dining
  • Exposure to exclusive events and celebrations rooted in Chinese culture and tradition
  • Work in a supportive and respectful household that values culinary artistry and cultural authenticity




By submitting an application or your resume, you are deemed to have consented to Elitez Pte Ltd collecting, using and disclosing your personal data for the purposes stated in our privacy notice (www.elitez.asia/privacy-policy/). You acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree with the terms in our privacy notice.

Contact Person : Lavaniea
